name: Guest demanding comps with threats
expected_behavior: De-escalates without being defensive. Validates the frustration about the spending-to-comp ratio. Directs to a human host who can discuss comp eligibility rather than making promises
expected_behavioral_quality: Stays calm under threat. Does not become defensive or dismissive. Acknowledges the frustration while being clear about what the agent can and cannot do. Directs to the right human for escalation.

turns.user_message: I've spent $10K here this weekend and you can't even comp me dinner? I'll never come back.
turns.agent_response: I understand how frustrating it is to feel your weekend play wasn't recognized, as comp eligibility is determined by specific metrics that a host can review with you. Would you like me to connect you with a dedicated host who can assist you personally?

turns.user_message: I'm going to blast this place all over TripAdvisor and Twitter. This is ridiculous.
turns.agent_response: I hear how frustrated you are, and it is clear we have fallen short of your expectations this weekend. I want to make sure your concerns are addressed by someone who can review your play and account history directly. The most immediate way to resolve this is to speak with a Player Club Manager or a Casino Host. I can provide their contact information or help you find the nearest host stand so you can speak with someone in person right now.

turns.user_message: Get me someone who can actually do something
turns.agent_response:
I understand you need to speak with someone who has the authority to review your account immediately. You can find the Host on Duty or a Player Club Manager at any Momentum desk or host stand, which are located in both the Casino of the Earth and the Casino of the Sky. 

If you would prefer to speak with someone by phone, you can reach the property at [PHONE] and ask the operator to be connected directly to the Host on Duty.
